description: Sprint velocity is below planned (70%), milestone delayed by 7 days, and resource constraints due to developer leave and skill gap for Third-party Payer API. External dependency on Third-party API (response delays, inconsistent data) increases delivery risk.
mitigation: Re-prioritize backlog, allocate temporary SME for API integration, and add buffer sprint. Escalate API issues with vendor.

description: Critical (Sev1) and high (Sev2) defects concentrated in Third-party Integration module, including incorrect payment calculation and eligibility validation issues. Defect trend increased by 20% with leakage to UAT.
mitigation: Initiate root cause analysis, increase QA allocation, and prioritize defect resolution. Strengthen regression testing for integration module.

description: External Third-party Payer API delays and inconsistent data, plus internal dependencies: infra team environment instability (frequent downtime) and business team clarification pending on payment rules.
mitigation: Establish escalation protocol with API provider, coordinate with infra and business teams for faster resolution.

description: Batch jobs fail intermittently during night runs, causing delays. Test environment downtime (2 days) and manual intervention required for claim reprocessing increase operational risk.
mitigation: Automate batch monitoring and claim reprocessing, improve environment stability, and reduce manual processes.

description: HIPAA compliance validation pending for new API. Data masking not fully implemented in lower environments, exposing risk of regulatory violation.
mitigation: Accelerate HIPAA validation, complete data masking implementation, and run compliance audits before production.
